command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
BASE='/home/jose/.local/share/moreno-unified-delegator/moreno_hub'

echo '=== worker_lock implementation ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "grep -n 'worker_lock\|flock\|fcntl\|locks' $BASE/core.py | head -30" 2>&1

echo '=== lsof on lock files ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "lsof /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/locks/ 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo 'lsof not available'" 2>&1

echo DONE_1937
